message:
refactor(main): improve output handling and daemon E2E test stability

main.rs:
- Continue migration from println! to Output abstraction for consistent
  formatting across output modes
- Improved output handling for various command outputs

daemon_e2e.rs:
- Test stability improvements for daemon end-to-end tests
- Better error handling and assertion messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
